title: kea bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[3.0.0-2]
- Support for sending startup notifications to systemd

[3.0.0-1]
- New version 3.0.0
- Remove broken keactrl in favor of systemd unit files
- kea.spec: General cleanup and removal of lines that have no effect
- kea-msg-compiler was moved from kea to kea-devel
full_text:
[3.0.0-2]
- Support for sending startup notifications to systemd

[3.0.0-1]
- New version 3.0.0
- Remove broken keactrl in favor of systemd unit files
- kea.spec: General cleanup and removal of lines that have no effect
- kea-msg-compiler was moved from kea to kea-devel

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20190-0.html
